summary: Completed comprehensive testing for المؤذن العالمي (The Global Muezzin) v2.0. Backend: 18/18 admin API tests passing including security verification (no password_hash exposed). Frontend: All major pages tested - Admin Dashboard with 4 tabs (overview, users, notifications, settings), Auth flow working with token storage, Home, Quran, Ruqyah, Prayer Times, More pages all functional with Arabic RTL layout. PWA service worker active.

minor.issue: When settings are updated, GET returns updated fields but loses default fields like app_name, default_method

issues: Shows loading spinner waiting for geolocation - expected behavior in test environment without location permission
Admin link not visible without login - user needs to be logged in as admin first (correct behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: Admin endpoints properly secured with JWT + email whitelist check
No password_hash exposed in any admin endpoint responses (verified)
AI athkar endpoint returns source='gemini' confirming real Gemini integration
Service worker (sw-custom.js) properly handles prayer notifications
Theme toggle using localStorage for persistence
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed users created during pytest runs for auth and admin permission testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. Admin dashboard fully functional with 4 tabs. PWA manifest.json accessible with correct Arabic app name. Service worker active for prayer notifications. AI features using real Gemini via Emergent LLM key. All frontend pages tested: Home (hero+hadith+prayer prompt), Auth (login/register), Admin (/admin with 4 tabs), Quran (surah list), Ruqyah (6 categories), Prayer Times (needs location), More (theme toggle, athan settings).

backend_apis.health: ✅ /api/health - returns healthy with app name المؤذن العالمي
backend_apis.daily_hadith: ✅ /api/daily-hadith - returns hadith with text, narrator, source
backend_apis.admin_auth: ✅ Non-admin users get 403 for admin endpoints

frontend_pages.home: ✅ Hero image, daily hadith, location prompt, bottom nav
frontend_pages.auth: ✅ Login/register tabs, Google login, form inputs
frontend_pages.quran: ✅ Surah list with Arabic/English names, play buttons, bookmark
frontend_pages.more: ✅ Theme toggle, athan settings, feature grid
